desc.desc: High chance to inflict Rage on 1 foe for 1 turn.
Decrease all foes' Defense by 20.3% for 3 turns.

tutorial.title: Unique Shadow Abilities
tutorial.content:
1. Cerberus uses <color=#FF423F>Taunt</color>, inflicting Rage on Phantom Thieves for 1 turn.
2.When Cerberus ends its turn, it is replaced by Orthrus.
3. Orthrus has an effect that decreases final damage. When it takes an attack, it counterattacks with <color=#FF423F>Double Fangs</color>, increasing the Phantom Thief's final damage taken. At the end of Orthrus's turn, it is replaced by Cerberus.
4. Each time Cerberus is replaced, <color=#FF423F>Guard Dog's Gaze</color> is gained, reducing damage taken and increasing final damage. These effects stack.

desc.desc: Deal Wind damage to all foes equal to 42.8% of Attack. 23.8% chance to inflict Windswept for 2 turns.
Deal Wind damage to all foes equal to 45.6% of Attack. 25.3% chance to inflict Windswept for 2 turns.
Deal Curse damage to all foes equal to 19.4% of Attack. Low chance to deal Curse insta-kill effect to foes with 50% or less HP. Increase chance based on foe's missing HP.
Deal Psy damage to all foes equal to 54.4% of Attack. Deal a Technical and increase damage by 40% for foes with a spiritual ailment.
Inflict Shadow Reversal on all foes for 2 turns.

tutorial.title: Unique Shadow Abilities
tutorial.content:
Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal.
1. When a summoned <color=#FF423F>Narcissus</color> takes an attack, it loses 1 <color=#FF423F>Shackles of Reflection</color> stack. When all of its Shackles of Reflection stacks are removed, the summoned Narcissus will be KO'd.
2. Narcissus has extremely high HP. At the end of Narcissus's turn, if a summoned Narcissus is not present, Narcissus recovers 18% of max HP. If a summoned Narcissus is present, Narcissus loses 18% of its max HP.
3. At the start of Leanan Sidhe's turn, if there are no summoned Narcissus present, it will summon 1 Narcissus. Leanan Sidhe uses <color=#FF423F>Shadow Reversal</color>, which inflicts all Phantom Thieves with an effect that reduces their HP by 10% each time they take an action.
